title: ExposedCredential
description: An individual credential exposure record linking a subject identifier (email, username, phone, or password hash) to one or more breach sources, with metadata about freshness and provenance.

subject_type.description: The kind of identifier this exposure pertains to.

subject_value.description: The identifier value being checked. For password-hash subjects this is typically a SHA-1 prefix to support k-anonymity.

exposed.description: Whether the subject was found in one or more breach datasets.

exposure_count.description: Number of distinct breach sources in which the subject appears.

first_seen.description: Earliest known appearance of the credential exposure.

last_seen.description: Most recent appearance of the credential exposure.

breach_sources.description: Breach records in which the subject was found.

stealer_log_hits.description: Number of distinct infostealer log entries the subject appears in.

password_strength.description: Qualitative strength assessment when the underlying password is known.

risk_level.description: Aggregate exposure risk derived from recency, breach severity, and data classes.

k_anonymity.description: K-anonymity envelope used when querying by password hash prefix.

hash_prefix.description: First N characters of the password hash submitted.

recommended_action.description: Operational guidance for the consumer of this record.
